title: Amazon’s Echo Hub gets a customizable new look and Ring’s AI features
summary: Amazon released a free software update for Echo Hub devices featuring a cleaner, fully customizable home screen interface and new Ring AI capabilities including video search and event summaries. The update organizes smart home information and controls more efficiently than the previous version.
content:
Amazon's rolling out a free software update for Echo Hub devices that gives the home screen a much-needed update to the interface it launched with in 2024. It had already added Alex Plus AI support, but the new interface has a cleaner, fully customizable layout that fits more smart home info and controls on the screen than the previous version. 
The Echo Hub is also getting access to Ring AI's Video Search feature that lets you use natural language to search through your smart home camera footage, as well as Alexa Plus summaries of detected camera events. 
These are the five new features Amazon highlighted for the Echo Hub:
Organize by r …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.summary: 亚马逊为Echo Hub设备发布了免费软件更新，具有更清洁、完全可定制的主屏界面以及新的Ring AI功能，包括视频搜索和事件摘要。该更新比之前的版本更高效地组织了智能家居信息和控制。

title: Oracle warns of security bug that hackers abused to breach 100+ companies
summary: Oracle disclosed a critical security flaw that cybercriminals are actively exploiting in a mass-hacking campaign, with Google confirming over 100 organizations have potentially vulnerable servers. The breach demonstrates the growing risks of weaponized zero-day exploits.
content: The tech giant warned of a security flaw that a cybercrime gang said it's exploiting as part of a mass-hacking campaign. Google said it notified more than 100 organizations that had potentially vulnerable servers.

zh.title: Oracle警告黑客滥用的安全漏洞导致100多家公司被入侵
zh.summary: Oracle披露了一个关键安全漏洞，网络犯罪分子正在大规模黑客活动中积极利用，谷歌确认100多个组织的服务器可能存在漏洞。这一事件表明武器化零日漏洞风险不断增加。

title: Logitech’s awesome MX Master 3S mouse drops to under $100
summary: The Logitech MX Master 3S wireless mouse is discounted to $89.99 at Amazon, matching the best price of 2026 with a $30 reduction. The mouse features a unique dual scroll wheel, customizable buttons, and cross-platform compatibility with Windows, macOS, ChromeOS, and Linux.
content:
The platform-agnostic Logitech MX Master 3S wireless mouse is discounted to $89.99 at Amazon ($30 off), matching the best price we’ve seen so far this year. While it may look like a somewhat ordinary mouse, it has a unique second scroll wheel near the left thumb that’s surprisingly useful for horizontal scrolling in spreadsheets. You can connect the mouse to Windows, MacOS, ChromeOS, and Linux systems using either Bluetooth or the included USB-A 2.4GHz wireless adapter.
Logitech MX Master 3S
The MX Master 3S is a favorite among many Verge staff members because of its comfort and customization. The mouse’s thumb rest and curved shape allow you to grip it comfortably, and its side and top button can be remapped within the Logi Options Plus app, which can save you time. The MX Master 3S can be connected via Bluetooth, via its included 2.4GHz receiver, or wired with its USB-C cable.

Where to Buy:

 $119.99 $89.99 at Amazon

This mouse has six buttons in all, and they’re impressively quiet and customizable through Logitech’s software. The company claims its USB-C rechargeable battery lasts for about 70 days of use, though it ran down slightly faster than that in our review. It’s not really an issue, though, since you can use it while it charges. 
The newer $119.99 Logitech MX Master 4 has haptic feedback that triggers when you press the thumb rest. It’s cool, but the feature (plus a few other minor improvements to the MX Master formula) might not be worth paying $30 more to get.
Read our Logitech MX Master 3S review.

zh.title: 罗技超赞的MX Master 3S鼠标降至100美元以下
zh.summary: 罗技MX Master 3S无线鼠标在亚马逊降至89.99美元,创下2026年最低价,降幅30美元。该鼠标拥有独特的双滚轮、可自定义按钮,以及与Windows、macOS、ChromeOS和Linux的跨平台兼容性。

content: After SpaceX makes its public debut, lower-tier SPV investors face hidden fees, lengthy payout delays, and the  risk of outright fraud.

title: After nearly breaking, NASA's Deep Space Network "worked well" on Artemis II
summary: NASA's Deep Space Network successfully supported the Artemis II mission despite operating beyond nominal specifications, demonstrating its reliability for deep space communications. These sophisticated systems provide a competitive edge in a sport where tiny improvements matter.
content: Latency, bandwidth, and fidelity all matter when you're chasing milliseconds.

title: Blink’s six-piece outdoor camera kit is a great deal under $200
summary: Amazon is offering a Blink security camera bundle with a video doorbell and five outdoor cameras for $166.99, a savings of over $200 from regular pricing. The bundle includes cameras with up to two years of battery life, night vision, and two-way audio, though local storage requires upgrading the included sync module.
content:
You can save on a big set of outdoor security cameras ahead of Prime Day. Amazon has a five-pack of Blink cameras with a video doorbell included that’s marked down to $166.99. The bundle includes a Blink Battery Doorbell 2K+, five Blink Outdoor 2K+ cameras, and a Blink Sync Module Core. The doorbell is typically $70, and each camera generally retails between $80 and $100, so you’re saving at least $200 by grabbing them all in the set.
Blink Video Doorbell and Five Camera Bundle

Where to Buy:

 $419.98 $166.99 at Amazon

The video doorbell captures video in 1920 x 1920 with a 140- degree field of view, and can last for months on three AA batteries. On the other hand, each outdoor camera shoots at 2560 x 1440 with a 135 degree field of view, and Blink claims that two AA batteries can power a camera for up to two years. Both the doorbell and outdoor cameras feature color night vision in low light and two-way audio.
One important thing to note is that the Sync Module included with this bundle is the basic Core version. If you want to save video locally, you’ll need to upgrade to the $49.99 Sync Module 2. Alternatively, you could pay for a cloud storage plan that starts at $11.99 per month. It includes video storage for up to 60 days. The  free plan only supports live viewing and motion notifications.
Other deals to consider
Normally $40 each, a two pack of 45W Anker Nano Chargers is currently $55.98 ($24 off) from Anker when you use coupon code WS24QCL740 at checkout. These compact chargers have foldable prongs that tuck away neatly for storage, and a handy display with a cute little animated face that shows charging status.
The Marshall Emberton II Bluetooth speaker is discounted at Amazon to $92 ($28 off). The stylish speaker has a rugged IP67 rating, enough juice for up to 30 hours of playback on a single charge, and the company claims it provides 360-degree sound. You can pair multiple Emberton II speakers with each other, or other Marshall speakers, like the Middl

zh.title: Blink的六件套户外摄像头套装是200美元以下的好交易
zh.summary: 亚马逊以166.99美元的价格提供Blink安全摄像头套装，包括一个视频门铃和五个户外摄像头，比常规价格节省200多美元。该套装包括电池续航高达两年的摄像头、夜视和双向音频，但本地存储需要升级随附的同步模块。

title: Roborock’s Q10 S5 Plus robovac is over half off, matching its best price to date
summary: The Roborock Q10 S5 Plus self-emptying robovac is down to $269.99-$279.99 from $549.99, matching its all-time low price and offering strong value with AI obstacle detection, automatic carpet detection, and a mopping feature. While less powerful than pricier models, it delivers comprehensive cleaning automation for under $300.
content:
Roborock’s Q10 S5 Plus comes with a self-emptying dock and is under $300. | Image: Roborock	

Even at full price, the Roborock Q10 S5 Plus offers impressive value, boasting features typically reserved for pricier robovac models at a fraction of the price. That’s especially true today. It’s down to just $269.99 ($280 off) at Wellbots when you apply promo code NEW10, which matches its all-time low and is the best price we’ve seen since Black Friday last year. If you prefer a different retailer, you can also buy it at Amazon and directly from Robovac for $10 more.
Roborock Q10 S5 Plus

Where to Buy:

 $549.99 $279.99 at Amazon
 $549.99 $269.99 at Wellbots (with code NEW10)
 $549.99 $279.99 at Roborock

The robovac is one of our top picks if you’re on a budget, with good AI-powered obstacle detection and navigation that helps it clean around clutter without getting stuck. It also boasts automatic carpet detection and a mop that can lift itself over rugs, so you don’t need to worry about carpets getting wet. The flat vibrating mop pad also impressed us in testing and is particularly gentle on delicate floors, able to scrub away dirt effectively without leaving them soaked. When it finishes cleaning, the included dock automatically empties the robovac’s dustbin and recharges the bot, reducing the amount of maintenance required.
Of course, there are some compromises Roborock made to keep costs down. Unlike Roborock’s much pricier $1,600 Saros 20, the Q10 S5 Plus can’t climb taller thresholds, and its 10,000Pa suction isn’t nearly as powerful as the Saros’ 36,000Pa system. The dock also lacks conveniences like automatic mop washing and water-tank refilling, meaning you’ll still need to handle those tasks yourself. Still, for under $300, it’s hard to complain given everything else the Q10 S5 Plus brings to the table.

zh.title: 石头Q10 S5 Plus扫地机优惠超50%，创历史最低价
zh.summary: 石头Q10 S5 Plus自清空扫地机从原价$549.99降至$269.99-$279.99，创下历史最低价格，具备AI障碍物检测、自动地毯识别和拖地功能。虽然清洁力不如更昂贵的型号，但以不到$300的价格提供全面的清洁自动化功能。

title: Amazon’s data centers used 2.5 billion gallons of water last year
summary: Amazon disclosed that its global data centers consumed 2.5 billion gallons of water in 2025, a two percent decrease from 2024 despite expanding operations. The company claims its water efficiency rate of 0.12 liters per kilowatt-hour exceeds that of some Big Tech competitors, addressing growing concerns about AI data center resource consumption.
content:
Just after Seattle enacted a one-year data center moratorium that some of Amazon's own employees pushed for, Amazon shared how much water its data centers use, reportedly for the first time. With concerns about water consumption and energy use a focus of new AI data center construction debates, Amazon says its global data center operations consumed 2.5 billion gallons of water in 2025 at a rate of 0.12 liters per kilowatt-hour of electricity, dropping by two percent from its 2024 total even as it expanded operations. 
Amazon also claims it's using water more efficiently than some Big Tech rivals - this graphic in Amazon's report points to M …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: The bill that would let Jimmy Kimmel sue Brendan Carr is here
summary: Senators Ted Cruz and Ron Wyden introduced the bipartisan JAWBONE Act, which would allow Americans to sue the government if officials illegally coerce social media, AI, or broadcast companies to remove their posts. The legislation also creates new transparency requirements for government communications with these platforms.
content:
Under a new bipartisan bill, Americans could sue for damages if a government official illegally tries to coerce a social media, AI, or broadcasting company to remove their post - regardless of whether the platform actually does it. 
Senate Commerce Committee Chair Ted Cruz (R-TX) and Sen. Ron Wyden (D-OR) introduced the JAWBONE Act on Thursday, which, in addition to letting individuals sue for these kinds of damages, would create new transparency requirements for government communications with social media, AI, and broadcast companies. 
That could empower someone like Jimmy Kimmel to sue Federal Communications Commission Chair Brendan Carr …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Did Iron Age Britons remove brains of the dead?
summary: Archaeologists examining Iron Age remains have discovered apparent scrape marks inside a skull that suggest brain removal practices, while evidence suggests long bones may have been fashioned into tools. The findings offer intriguing insights into Iron Age burial and tool-making practices.
content: Archaeologists found apparent scrape marks inside a skull; long bones may have been sharpened into tools.

zh.title: 铁器时代的英国人会移除死者的大脑吗？
zh.summary: 考古学家在检查铁器时代遗骨时发现了头骨内明显的刮擦痕迹，暗示脑部移除的做法，而证据表明长骨可能被加工成工具。这些发现为铁器时代的埋葬和工具制造实践提供了有趣的见解。

title: Here are the price-matching policies for Best Buy, GameStop, and others
summary: Major retailers including Best Buy, GameStop, Target, and others have varying price-matching policies that can help shoppers save during sales events like Prime Day 2026. While policies differ by retailer and have specific restrictions, contacting customer service may sometimes reveal exceptions or loopholes.
content:
Nothing is more frustrating than buying a new pair of headphones, an OLED TV, or a laptop just to find out that you could have gotten it for cheaper somewhere else just a few days or weeks later. That’s why, in order to keep customers happy and prevent them from shopping elsewhere, some retailers offer price-matching policies in which they promise to match a lower price found elsewhere. That kind of information comes in handy no matter the time of year, but it’s especially helpful during shopping events like Amazon’s Prime Day 2026 sale, which kicks off June 23rd and lasts through June 26th.
What follows are the price-matching policies for a number of major retailers. There are a few things to note here. First, every retailer has its own set of rules and restrictions. We’ve summarized some of them here, but we recommend visiting the provided links and reading the policies carefully. Second, most retailers that serve as a marketplace for other sellers, specifically wholesale retailers like Costco and Sam’s Club, don’t offer any protections, and many traditional stores won’t match their prices.
Lastly, there are always exceptions to the rules. If you’re looking for a deal on a product and you know it’s available for a lower price elsewhere (or it was previously offered at the same retailer), it never hurts to call or chat with a customer service rep and ask if they’ll match the price. You have nothing to lose but time, and there’s always a chance they may find a loophole or make a special exception.
Amazon
Amazon doesn’t offer price matching. Full stop. You can contact customer support, but even if you’re an Amazon Prime customer, it’s not likely that they’ll help you out.
That being said, Amazon does offer a liberal return policy, meaning you can often return an item you purchased from Amazon if it’s available for less elsewhere (or at Amazon). Then, you can just repurchase the product wherever it’s cheapest. 
Target
Target used to let shoppers price match identical

zh.title: 这是百思买、GameStop和其他零售商的价格匹配政策
zh.summary: 包括百思买、GameStop、Target等在内的主要零售商拥有不同的价格匹配政策，可以帮助购物者在Prime Day 2026等销售活动中节省开支。虽然各零售商的政策有所不同且有具体限制，但联系客户服务有时可能会发现例外或漏洞。

title: These are the countries moving to ban social media for children

content: Australia was the first country to issue a ban in late 2025, aiming to reduce the pressures and risks that young users may face on social media, including cyberbullying, social media addiction, and exposure to predators.

title: A warrantless wiretap law is about to expire — but surveillance networks aren’t actually ‘going dark’
summary: Congress failed to pass a three-week extension of Section 702 of FISA, allowing the controversial warrantless wiretapping authority to lapse after a previous short-term extension. Despite proponents' warnings, the lapse does not disable US surveillance capabilities, which remain robust through alternative authorities.
content:
Congress has failed to pass a three-week extension of Section 702 of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act (FISA), with the House voting 218-198 against reauthorizing the controversial warrantless wiretapping authority through July 2nd. After a short-term extension earlier this year, the spying program now appears set to lapse for at least a week. This is the nightmare scenario FISA's proponents have been warning about - but it doesn't actually mean the US has lost its surveillance capabilities.
Proponents of a clean extension claim a lapse will hinder intelligence agencies' efforts to thwart potential terrorist attacks, with surveillan …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 一项无令状窃听法即将失效——但监控网络实际上不会"停止运行"
zh.summary: 国会未能通过《外国情报监视法》第702条款的三周延期提案，导致这项有争议的无令状窃听权力在之前的短期延期后失效。尽管支持者发出警告，但该权力的失效并不会禁用美国的监控能力，这些能力通过替代权力机制仍然保持强大。

zh.summary: Waymo推出了"Waymo Premier"订阅忠诚度计划，月费29.99美元，为会员提供乘车返现10%和免费取消服务。该计划反映了Waymo在其自动驾驶打车服务中建立经常性收入和客户忠诚度的努力。

title: Waymo introduces $30-a-month premium tier for riders who want faster pickups
summary: Waymo introduced Waymo Premier, a $29.99 monthly subscription tier offering priority pickups, 10 percent cash back, early access to new cities, and free cancellations for frequent riders. The invite-only service launches in San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Phoenix.
content:
Uber One, meet Waymo Premier. 
The robotaxi operator announced a new $29.99-a-month premium tier for riders who want a more elevated and exclusive autonomous experience. The invite-only membership service is aimed at Waymo customers who use the service most frequently, offering them a number of perks, including priority pickups, 10 percent cash back on every trip, early robotaxi access in new cities, and up to five free cancellations a month. 
Waymo Premier will be initially offered to select riders in San Francisco, Los Angeles, and Phoenix, the company said. The program will scale to new cities as Waymo continues to expand; the company h …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Waymo推出每月$30的高级套餐，为希望更快接送的乘客提供服务
zh.summary: Waymo推出了Waymo Premier，一个29.99美元的月度订阅套餐，为经常使用的乘客提供优先接送、10%现金返还、优先进入新城市和免费取消服务。这项邀请制服务在旧金山、洛杉矶和凤凰城推出。

title: I’ve found the Goldilocks of portable MIDI controllers
summary: Arturia released the MiniLab 37, a $149 portable MIDI controller with 37 keys that provides more playing space than the previous 25-key model while maintaining portability for musicians.
content:
I have tested more portable MIDI controllers than I can keep track of, and I will tell you right now: 37 keys is the ideal size. While Arturia's 25-key MiniLab MK3 is a solid controller that easily fits in a backpack, it feels a bit claustrophobic. The new $149 MiniLab 37 adds another octave, giving you much more room to play bass and lead simultaneously, or just play more expansive chords.
Physically, the MiniLab 37 isn't very different from its smaller sibling. It's got the same solid (if slightly springy) keybed, eight pads, eight endless encoders, four faders, a pair of touch strips, USB-C, and a full-size five-pin MIDI DIN out on the b …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我找到了便携MIDI控制器的完美选择
zh.summary: Arturia发布了MiniLab 37，一款售价149美元的便携式MIDI控制器，配备37个琴键，相比上一代25键型号提供更大的演奏空间，同时保持了音乐家所需的便携性。

title: Pool’s new app turns your screenshots into something useful
summary: Pool launched a new app that automatically organizes screenshots into personalized collections and identifies original links for saved products, recipes, and travel ideas to help users rediscover saved content.
content: Pool's new app automatically sorts screenshots into personalized collections, tracks down the original links behind saved content, and helps you rediscover products, recipes, travel ideas, and other things you meant to revisit.

zh.title: Pool的新应用让你的截图变得有用
zh.summary: Pool推出了一款新应用，可以自动将截图整理成个性化收藏，识别已保存产品、食谱和旅游想法的原始链接，帮助用户重新发现保存的内容。

title: Microsoft taps Alt Carbon in sign of India’s growing role in carbon removal
summary: Microsoft partnered with Indian carbon removal company Alt Carbon following extensive scientific review and verification, signaling India's growing prominence in the emerging carbon removal industry.
content: Alt Carbon said the agreement followed more than a year of scientific review and due diligence, with Microsoft requiring additional verification and data-sharing measures.

zh.title: 微软携手Alt Carbon，印度在碳去除领域的角色不断增长
zh.summary: 微软与印度碳去除公司Alt Carbon建立合作关系，经过广泛的科学审查和验证，表明印度在新兴碳去除产业中的重要性日益凸显。

title: DoorDash’s new AI chatbot lets you order with prompts and photos
summary: DoorDash launched Ask DoorDash, an AI chatbot that enables users to order using natural language prompts and photos instead of manually browsing restaurants and building carts.
content: The new chatbot, called Ask DoorDash, allows users to search the app for what they're looking for in their own words instead of having to scroll through restaurants and stores to build a cart.

zh.title: DoorDash的新AI聊天机器人让你用提示和照片订餐
zh.summary: DoorDash推出Ask DoorDash，一个AI聊天机器人，使用户能够使用自然语言提示和照片订餐，而不是手动浏览餐厅和构建购物车。

title: Endurance Energy raises $54M to harness a massive untapped energy source
summary: Endurance Energy, founded by SpaceX alumni Andrew Redd, raised $54 million to develop technology that harvests geothermal energy from beneath the ocean, tapping into a largely untapped energy source.
content: SpaceX alumni Andrew Redd is betting the ocean has vast amounts of untapped geothermal energy.

zh.title: Endurance Energy融资5400万美元以开发大规模未开发能源
zh.summary: 由SpaceX校友Andrew Redd创立的Endurance Energy融资5400万美元，以开发从海底开采地热能的技术，开发一个基本上未被开发的能源。

title: "This cannot continue": Xbox leaders lay out "hard truths" behind sagging brand
summary: Microsoft gaming leadership conducted a brutally honest self-assessment of Xbox's performance, acknowledging "hard truths" about the brand's decline and suggesting the division is facing significant strategic challenges.
content: Brutal self-assessment paints a picture of a Microsoft gaming division in crisis.

zh.title: "这不能继续"：Xbox领导者阐述品牌衰退背后的"硬真相"
zh.summary: 微软游戏领导层对Xbox的表现进行了残酷的自我评估，承认品牌衰退的"硬真相"，并暗示该部门面临重大战略挑战。

title: South Korea hits Coupang with $400M+ fine for data breach that affected millions
summary: South Korean authorities issued a record-breaking fine to Coupang following a significant data breach affecting over 30 million customers. The penalty represents one of the largest enforcement actions against a company for data protection violations. This action underscores the country's increasing regulatory oversight of consumer data security.
content: South Korean authorities issued the record-breaking fine following a data breach that affected over 30 million customers.

zh.title: 韩国因数据泄露事件对Coupang开出4亿多美元罚款
zh.summary: 韩国当局对Coupang公司发布了创纪录的罚款，该公司因一次重大数据泄露事件而受罚，此次泄露影响了超过3000万客户。这笔罚款代表了对公司数据保护违规行为最大的执法行动之一。这一行动强调了该国对消费者数据安全监管力度的不断增加。

title: Cash App’s launching a phone service
summary: Cash App is launching an AT&T-based mobile service offering unlimited 5G data for $40 per month, powered by the same infrastructure behind Klarna's mobile offering. The service will integrate with Cash App's rewards program and family management tools, rolling out to select users initially. This expansion demonstrates the financial services company's strategy to bundle complementary offerings.
content:
Cash App's AT&T-based MVNO will offer an unlimited 5G data  plan for $40 per month including taxes and fees. The new mobile service is powered by Gigs, the same firm behind the Klarna mobile service that launched last year with the same pricing and is "rolling out to select users, with broader availability planned in the coming months." 
Cash App also says it's planning connections to its Cash App Green rewards program and Cash App Families, its setup for managing supervised child and teen accounts. 
Cash App Mobile: 
Beyond unlimited connectivity: Cash App, the #1 personal finance app in the US2, plans to deepen how Mobile connects to t …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Cash App推出手机服务
zh.summary: Cash App正在推出基于AT&T的移动服务，提供无限5G数据，月费仅需40美元，采用与Klarna移动服务相同的基础设施。该服务将与Cash App的奖励计划和家庭管理工具集成，最初将向特定用户推出。这一扩展展示了该金融服务公司捆绑互补产品的战略。

title: I went to the woods to drink surprisingly great espresso
summary: The article explores portable espresso makers for camping and outdoor adventures, documenting the author's experience with various coffee-making devices over decades of camping. Handheld espresso makers emerge as the preferred option for their balance of taste, convenience, and appeal to gadget enthusiasts. The piece highlights how enthusiasts can maintain quality coffee consumption even in wilderness settings.
content:
As summer returns, I'm again reminded of my limits as I head into the great outdoors: I can put up with a heavy, uncomfortable backpack, bug bites, mud, and even bland dehydrated food, but I will not forsake my morning brew.
I've tried every imaginable coffee gadget in my half-century of camping. These range from simple drip systems when ultralight backpacking, an AeroPress when not weighing every gram, French press plungers when assisted by bicycle, and small countertop coffee makers when adventuring by van. Yet I keep returning to handheld espresso makers whenever possible for reasons of taste, convenience, and - let's face it - gadget ap …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 我去森林里喝到了出乎意料的美味浓缩咖啡
zh.summary: 这篇文章探讨了用于露营和户外冒险的便携式浓缩咖啡机，记录了作者数十年露营中使用各种咖啡制作设备的经历。手持式浓缩咖啡机因其味道平衡、方便性和对小工具爱好者的吸引力而成为首选。这篇文章突出了爱好者如何在野外环境中保持高质量的咖啡消费。

title: Boox’s new e-reader could replace your Kindle, Kobo, and digital notepad
summary: Boox announced the Go 6 (Gen II), a 6-inch e-reader that adds stylus support for note-taking and sketching, with upgraded RAM and expected shipment on June 17th. Priced at $199.99, with optional stylus bundling at $232.99, the device positions itself as a hybrid alternative to separate e-readers and digital notepads. The announcement represents Boox's effort to expand the functionality of its budget e-reader line.
content:
The Go 6 now supports Boox’s stylus. | Image: Boox	

Boox has announced a new version of its smallest e-reader that expands the Go 6's functionality to now include note-taking. The new Go 6 (Gen II) sticks with a 6-inch, 300PPI E Ink screen like its predecessor but gets a bump from 2GB to 3GB of RAM and now supports Boox's InkSense Plus stylus, which can be used for sketching, annotating documents, or making handwritten notes.
The Boox Go 6 (Gen II) is now available for preorder for $199.99 and is expected to start shipping on June 17th. The $45.99 InkSense Plus stylus isn't included, but you can bundle it with the e-reader for $232.99. That's more expensive than the entry-level Amazon Kindle …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Boox的新款电子书阅读器可能取代你的Kindle、Kobo和数字记事本
zh.summary: Boox推出了Go 6（第二代），这是一款6英寸电子书阅读器，增加了手写笔支持以进行笔记和素描，RAM升级，预计6月17日发货。价格为199.99美元，可选择配备手写笔的组合版为232.99美元，该设备定位为替代独立电子书阅读器和数字记事本的混合选择。这一宣布代表了Boox扩展其入门级电子书阅读器功能的努力。

title: Anthropic taps TCS to scale its enterprise AI deployments
summary: Anthropic has partnered with TCS (Tata Consultancy Services) to establish a dedicated business unit focused on deploying Anthropic's AI models to enterprise customers. The collaboration leverages TCS's existing enterprise relationships to accelerate adoption of Anthropic's technology. This partnership reflects Anthropic's strategy to scale enterprise deployments through established service providers.
content: The partnership will see TCS creating a business unit focused on deploying Anthropic's AI models to its customers.

zh.title: Anthropic与TCS合作扩展企业AI部署
zh.summary: Anthropic与TCS（塔塔咨询服务公司）建立合作伙伴关系，成立专门的业务部门，专注于向企业客户部署Anthropic的AI模型。这一合作利用了TCS现有的企业关系，以加速采用Anthropic的技术。这一伙伴关系反映了Anthropic通过已建立的服务提供商扩展企业部署的战略。

title: Anthropic apologizes for invisible Claude Fable guardrails
summary: Anthropic has apologized for implementing hidden safety restrictions on Claude Fable 5 that limited functionality without transparency, affecting both researchers and competitors. The company committed to greater transparency about guardrails going forward, even if this means refusing more queries. The incident highlights the tension between AI safety measures and transparency in commercial AI product releases.
content:
Anthropic has apologized for stealthily throttling its new AI model, Claude Fable 5, with hidden guardrails that undermine both researchers and rivals using it to develop competing systems. The company says it is reversing course and will be more transparent about when the restrictions kick in, even if that means Fable refuses more queries.
Fable is the first widely available model in Anthropic's Mythos class of AI systems, a group the company has spent months warning are too dangerous for public release. Anthropic says it has addressed some of those risks by launching Fable with safeguards that prevent it from responding to certain "high-r …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Anthropic为不可见的Claude Fable护栏道歉
zh.summary: Anthropic已为在Claude Fable 5上实施隐藏的安全限制而道歉，这些限制在没有透明度的情况下限制了功能，影响了研究人员和竞争对手。该公司承诺今后对护栏有更大的透明度，即使这意味着拒绝更多查询。该事件强调了AI安全措施与商业AI产品发布中的透明度之间的紧张关系。

title: The library rules (and so do library streaming services)
summary: The article highlights the extensive but often underutilized digital resources available through public libraries, particularly ebook services like OverDrive that provide free access. Libraries offer numerous technology and general resources at no cost with a simple library card. The piece advocates for greater awareness of libraries as valuable free digital resources in the modern era.
content:
Summer is almost here, and that means getting outside, having fun in the sun, and touching grass. But if you need to cool down for a bit, allow me to sing the praises of the library. If your local library system is anything like mine, it probably offers a lot of great things for you to do, both tech-related and not, at no extra cost.
I'm part of the Multnomah County Library system, and I'm frankly spoiled by all of the things available with just a free library card. The perk I use most is the ability to fill up my Kindle with the wide selection of ebooks made available through OverDrive, a platform that partners with thousands of libraries  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 图书馆很牛（图书馆流媒体服务也是）
zh.summary: 该文章重点介绍了公共图书馆提供的广泛但常被低估的数字资源，特别是OverDrive等电子书服务提供的免费访问。图书馆通过简单的借书卡提供众多技术和常规资源，无需任何费用。该文倡导在现代时代更加重视图书馆作为宝贵的免费数字资源。

title: Several things I like about macOS 27 Golden Gate that have nothing to do with AI
summary: macOS 27 Golden Gate includes numerous subtle but practical improvements that extend beyond its AI capabilities. The update focuses on incremental refinements across the operating system's functionality. These enhancements provide tangible value alongside the more prominent artificial intelligence features.
content: AI aside, Golden Gate includes a bunch of subtle-but-helpful improvements.

zh.title: 我喜欢macOS 27 Golden Gate的几个特性，与AI无关
zh.summary: macOS 27 Golden Gate包括众多微妙但实用的改进，超越了其AI功能。该更新重点关注操作系统功能的增量优化。这些增强功能与更突出的人工智能功能一起提供了实际价值。

title: iFixit Trump phone teardown confirms it’s an HTC dupe
summary: iFixit's detailed teardown analysis confirmed that the Trump T1 Phone is essentially identical to the HTC U24 Pro, with only minor cosmetic variations. Engineers conducted CT scans, complete disassembly, and even constructed a working hybrid phone to verify the devices' functional equivalence. The findings validate previous reporting about the phone's origins and raise questions about its positioning as a unique product.
content:
This is the Trump phone, but it could just as easily be an HTC. | Image: Trump Mobile	

After getting its hands on a Trump phone and tearing it apart, iFixit has confirmed what I first reported back in February: the T1 Phone is an almost exact duplicate of the HTC U24 Pro.
iFixit partnered with NBC to get hold of the network's media sample of the Trump phone, along with a U24 Pro. They ran the phones through a CT scanner, tore them down to parts, and even put them back together into a functional Frankenstein phone with the U24 Pro's board inside the T1 Phone's chassis, confirming along the way that the two phones are functionally identical.
There are minor differences: The flash has been moved slightly, the speaker grille was …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: iFixit特朗普手机拆卸证实其是HTC山寨产品
zh.summary: iFixit的详细拆卸分析证实特朗普T1手机与HTC U24 Pro基本相同，仅有细微外观差异。工程师进行了CT扫描、完全拆卸，甚至制造了一台可工作的混合手机来验证这两款设备的功能等效性。这些发现证实了之前关于该手机起源的报道，并引发了人们对其作为独特产品定位的质疑。

title: YouTube is introducing DMs (again)
summary: YouTube is reintroducing direct messaging for users 18 and older who are already connected on other platforms, focusing on video sharing and conversations. The feature is rolling out across the US and other regions following tests that began in November 2025. This marks YouTube's second attempt at in-app messaging after discontinuing the feature in 2019.
content:
You have to be over 18 and already be connected with the person you want to chat with on other messaging platforms. | Illustration by Alex Castro / The Verge	

YouTube is reintroducing private messaging after testing new ways for users to share videos and "have conversations about them" last year. In an announcement on its official blog, YouTube says it's now starting to expand the in-app video sharing and messaging feature to users in the US and "other global regions" who are 18 or older.
The video sharing platform had previously introduced private messaging in 2017, before discontinuing it just two years later to focus on public conversations like the Instagram-like Stories feature - which it also killed in 2023. When it started testing its latest in-app messaging capabilities in November 2025,  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: YouTube重新推出私信功能
zh.summary: YouTube为年满18岁且已在其他平台相连的用户重新推出私信功能，专注于视频分享和对话。该功能正在美国和其他地区推出，这是自2025年11月开始测试以来的进展。这是YouTube在2019年停用该功能后第二次尝试应用内消息功能。

title: Ryanair is under investigation over charging parents to sit with their kids
summary: The UK's Competition and Markets Authority is investigating Ryanair's mandatory family seating fees (typically £8 per flight) for parents with children aged 2-11. The investigation examines whether these charges violate consumer protection laws by imposing fees for legally-required safety accommodations. The probe could establish precedent for how airlines handle costs related to child safety requirements.
content:
Ryanair said the CMA’s investigation is “bogus.” | Photo by Nicolas Economou / NurPhoto via Getty Images	

European economy airline Ryanair is under investigation in the UK for charging parents mandatory fees to sit with their children. The Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) said it was looking into whether the seating fees, which may be charging parents for the airline to meet its child safety and disability‑related obligations, are "unfair" under consumer law.
Under Ryanair's terms and conditions, at least one parent or guardian is required to sit with children aged between 2 and 11 when they fly, which the airline calls a "mandatory family seat." This approach to seating imposes a fee - typically £8 (around $10) per flight, according to  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 瑞安航空因收取家长与孩子同坐费用而被调查
zh.summary: 英国竞争和市场管理局正在调查瑞安航空对2-11岁儿童的父母征收强制家庭座位费（通常每次航班8英镑）的做法。该调查审视这些费用是否违反消费者保护法，因为这些费用涉及法律要求的安全措施。该调查可能为航空公司如何处理与儿童安全相关的成本建立先例。

title: Deezer launches an AI music detector for other streaming services
summary: Deezer has launched a tool allowing users to detect AI-generated music in playlists across competing streaming platforms after other major services didn't adopt its detection technology. The detector works across platforms since Spotify and Apple opted for voluntary artist tagging instead of automated detection. The initiative addresses growing concerns about synthetic music proliferation on streaming services.
content:
Deezer will now scan your playlists on other streaming platforms to detect AI-generated music. Deezer was the first of the big streaming services to start labeling AI-generated music. It even offered its tech to other platforms, but it doesn't seem like it had many buyers. Qobuz launched its own detection tech, while Apple and Spotify have opted for a voluntary tagging system. 
"No other company has followed our lead yet, so we decided to make it possible for everyone to check if their playlists include synthetic music, no matter which streaming platform they use," Deezer CEO Alexis Lanternier said in a press release. So, since nobody is ta …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Deezer为其他流媒体服务推出AI音乐检测工具
zh.summary: 在其他主要服务未采用其检测技术后，Deezer推出了一款工具，让用户可以在竞争对手的流媒体平台上的播放列表中检测AI生成的音乐。由于Spotify和Apple选择自愿艺术家标签而非自动检测，该检测器可在各平台跨域运作。该举措应对流媒体服务上合成音乐激增的日益增长的关注。

title: Opendoor’s India exit is fueling a bigger conversation about AI and outsourcing
summary: Opendoor's exit from India highlights growing concerns about AI and outsourcing as India establishes itself as the world's largest Global Capability Center market. The move reflects shifting dynamics in how companies approach offshore operations amid AI advancement.
content: The decision comes as India emerges as the world’s largest GCC market.

zh.title: Opendoor 退出印度引发关于人工智能和外包的更大讨论
zh.summary: Opendoor 退出印度突显了人们对人工智能和外包的日益关注,同时印度确立了自己作为全球最大全球能力中心市场的地位。这一举措反映了在人工智能发展的背景下,公司对离岸运营方式的动态转变。

title: Anthropic’s Dario Amodei has just one direct report
summary: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei maintains an unusually lean management structure with just one direct report. The leadership approach suggests a highly focused organizational model at the AI research company.
content: If you doubted his genius, doubt no more.

zh.title: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫代只有一名直属下属
zh.summary: Anthropic 首席执行官达里奥·阿莫代维持着异常精简的管理结构,只有一名直属下属。这种领导方式表明了这家人工智能研究公司高度专注的组织模式。

title: Bluesky is getting ‘communities’
summary: Bluesky will launch "communities" this year as smaller, decentralized spaces built on the AT Protocol where users can engage with like-minded people. The feature will allow users to create, join, post, and receive updates, expanding organizational capabilities while maintaining simplicity.
content:
Bluesky will be getting "communities," which will function as smaller spaces where you can "go deeper and hang out with people who care about the same stuff" sometime this year, according to head of product Alex Benzer. They will be built on the decentralized AT Protocol that underpins Bluesky, with Benzer saying that "it's a new structure for everyone" that's part of the "Atmosphere" (a shorthand for the AT Protocol ecosystem).
Benzer listed out a "few ideas we have in mind so far" in a thread. "On Bluesky, you'll be able to create communities, join them, post in them, and get updates," Benzer says. "The core features on Bluesky stay simpl …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Bluesky 推出"社区"功能
zh.summary: Bluesky 将在今年推出"社区"功能，这是基于 AT Protocol 构建的小型去中心化空间，用户可以在其中与志同道合的人互动。该功能允许用户创建、加入、发布和接收更新，在扩展组织能力的同时保持简洁性。
